intro.headline: Good news — nothing required for 100% is permanently missable.
points: You can finish every favor and collectible in free roam after the credits. Many collectibles don't even spawn until the story is done.
Story-only areas that lock behind you (like Asgard) contain nothing needed for 100% or trophies.
The game flags major points of no return before you cross them.
So play the story without fear and mop everything up at your own pace — this checklist is just so nothing slips your mind.

sections.title: Time-sensitive / one-time areas
sections.note: These lock behind story progress. Per the completion guides none hold anything needed for 100%, but explore them fully while you're there.

items.label: Asgard — explore it fully during the story; it's permanently inaccessible after the final battle
Heed the game's point-of-no-return prompts before the final mission and before leaving certain story areas
Some favors and realm areas only unlock as the story progresses — revisit realms after big story beats

sections.title: Favors — World (span multiple realms)
sections.note: These open up as you progress and are completed across several realms.

sections.title: 100% collectibles tracker (return-friendly)
sections.note: 418 collectibles in total. Tick a category once you've cleared it — none of these are lost if you progress the story.

items.label: Nornir Chests — all 35 (Idunn Apple & Horn of Blood Mead upgrades)
Flowers — one from each of the 9 realms (Nine Realms in Bloom)
Legendary Chests — open every one (gear & runic attacks)
Berserker Gravestones — defeat every Berserker (Fit for a King)
Draugr Holes & Hel Tears — clear them all
Buried Treasure (treasure maps) — dig up each one
Yggdrasil Rifts & Remnants of Asgard — clear them all
